pages.translation: Three little pigs lived in the forest.
The first built a house of straw.
The second built a house of wood.
The third built a house of stones.
A big wolf came to scare them.

pages.hebrew: הַזְּאֵב נָפַח עַל בֵּית הַקַּשׁ, וְהוּא נָפָל.
pages.translation: The wolf blew on the straw house, and it fell.

pages.hebrew: הַזְּאֵב נָפַח עַל בֵּית הַקּוֹרוֹת, וְהוּא נָפָל.
pages.translation: The wolf blew on the wood house, and it fell.

pages.hebrew: הַזְּאֵב לֹא יָכוֹל לְהַפִּיל אֶת בֵּית הָאֲבָנִים.
pages.translation: The wolf could not blow down the stone house.
The little pigs were safe in their house.
